_description: Dicebound notable feature data. This file stores visual notable features used by the frontend character builder and backend portrait prompt system. Each feature includes species availability and prompt-specific instructions so portrait generation can describe the selected feature clearly instead of relying on vague feature names. JavaScript should preserve all fields on each feature object. The name field is used for dropdown display, while promptInstruction, visibilityInstruction and negativePrompt are used during portrait prompt construction.

notableFeatures.name: No Obvious Unusual Feature
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Do not add any unusual scar, tattoo, piercing, missing body part, glowing feature, damaged horn, unusual eye, birthmark, ritual mark or distinctive injury.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Keep the face, head, hands and upper body natural for the selected species. Do not invent a notable feature.

notableFeatures.name: Small Scar On Face
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one small but clearly visible healed scar on the face. It should be a short pale or darker line of healed skin damage, not a tattoo, face paint, dirt, wrinkle or shadow.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The face must be close, clear and well lit. Place the small scar on a visible cheek, brow, temple, nose or jaw area so it can be noticed in a bust portrait.

notableFeatures.name: Large Scar On Face
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one large clearly visible healed scar across part of the face. The scar should be immediately noticeable as old healed skin damage, not decoration, paint, dirt or shadow.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The face must be close, clear and unobstructed. The scar should cross a visible cheek, brow, nose, jaw or one side of the face without being hidden by hair, hood, helmet, shadow or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Scar Across One Eyebrow
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one healed scar cutting clearly through one eyebrow. The scar must visibly interrupt the eyebrow hair and continue slightly above or below the brow.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Both eyes and eyebrows must be visible. Do not cover the eyebrow area with hair, hood, helmet, shadow, mask or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Scar Across The Nose
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a healed scar crossing the bridge, ridge or side of the nose. The scar must follow the shape of the nose and be visibly separate from normal nose shading.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Use a clear front or three-quarter face angle. The nose must be unobstructed and well lit so the scar across the nose is easy to see.

notableFeatures.name: Scar Across One Cheek
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one realistic healed scar across one cheek. It should be a clear line or jagged mark of old skin damage, not paint, dirt, makeup or decorative tattoo.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: At least one cheek must be clearly visible, close and well lit. Do not hide the cheek with hair, hand, collar, weapon, shadow, helmet, hood or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Jagged Scar Along The Jaw
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a jagged healed scar following the jawline. It should be uneven, old and visibly healed, with an irregular shape along the lower face.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The jawline must be visible. Do not hide it with a high collar, beard, scarf, hand, weapon, helmet, hood or deep shadow.

notableFeatures.name: Burn Scar On Face
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a visible healed burn scar on part of the face, with uneven old scar texture and changed skin surface. It must look healed and non-graphic, not like fresh injury, paint, dirt or lighting.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The affected part of the face must be clear, close and not hidden by hair, helmet, hood, mask, hand or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: Burn Scar On One Hand
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one visible bare hand with a healed burn scar. The hand should show old uneven scar texture across the fingers, back of the hand or wrist area, without gore.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: One bare hand must be clearly shown near the chest, shoulder, face or weapon grip. The scarred hand must not be hidden by gloves, sleeves, weapon, cloak, cropping or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: One Clouded Eye
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show exactly one eye clearly clouded, pale, milky, cataract-like or blind-looking. The other eye must remain normal and keep the selected eye colour.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Both eyes must be open, sharp, close and visible. The viewer must be able to tell that only one eye is clouded and the other eye is normal.
negativePrompt: glowing eyes instead of clouded eye

notableFeatures.name: One Missing Eye
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one eye missing, empty, scarred over or covered by a simple eyepatch. The other eye must remain visible and normal for the selected species.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The face must be clear and frontal or three-quarter view. The missing eye or eyepatch must be obvious, not hidden by hair, shadow, helmet, hood or pose.
negativePrompt: decorative makeup instead of missing eye

notableFeatures.name: Blind In One Eye
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show exactly one eye visibly blind, pale, unfocused or cloudy, while the other eye remains normal, alert and the selected eye colour.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Both eyes must be visible and open. Do not hide either eye with hair, shadow, helmet, hood, mask or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Distinctive Birthmark On Face
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one distinctive natural birthmark on the face. It should be an obvious patch, spot or irregular area of natural skin pigmentation, not a tattoo, scar, dirt, bruise or face paint.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Place the birthmark on a visible cheek, forehead, temple, nose area or jaw. The face must be close, clear and unobstructed.

notableFeatures.name: Distinctive Birthmark On Neck
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one distinctive natural birthmark on the neck. It should look like natural skin pigmentation on visible skin, not a tattoo, scar, dirt, bruise or paint.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The neck must be visible. Do not hide the birthmark with a scarf, high collar, beard, hair, armour, cloak, hand or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: Freckles Across The Nose And Cheeks
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show many small natural freckles scattered across the nose and both cheeks. They should be clearly present as natural skin spots, not dirt, paint, scars or shadow.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The nose and cheeks must be close, clear, well lit and unobstructed so the freckles are visible.

notableFeatures.name: Small Face Tattoo
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one small intentional face tattoo. It must look like deliberate ink under the skin or on scales, not a scar, dirt, shadow, bruise or accidental mark.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Place the tattoo on a visible cheek, temple, forehead, chin or below one eye. The face must be close and unobstructed.

notableFeatures.name: Full Face Tattoo
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a large deliberate full-face tattoo covering much of the face with clear ink patterns. It should be unmistakable as tattooed design, not scars, dirt, shadow or face paint.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The face must be close, frontal or three-quarter, and unobstructed so the full-face tattoo is immediately visible.

notableFeatures.name: Tattoo Around One Eye
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a deliberate tattoo encircling, framing or radiating around one eye. It should look like clear ink design, not bruising, shadow, scar tissue or makeup.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Both eyes and the tattooed eye area must be visible, close and unobstructed. Do not cover the tattoo with hair, hood, helmet, shadow or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Ritual Mark On Forehead
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one deliberate ritual mark, rune or symbol clearly placed on the forehead. It may look painted, inked, branded or magically marked, but it must be intentional and readable as a mark.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The forehead must be visible and unobstructed. Do not cover it with hair, fringe, helmet, hood, crown, shadow or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Ritual Mark On Cheek
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one deliberate ritual mark, rune or symbol clearly placed on one cheek. It may look painted, inked, branded or magically marked, but it must be intentional and visibly distinct from a scar or dirt smudge.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: At least one cheek must be visible, close and unobstructed. Do not hide the cheek with hair, hand, weapon, hood, helmet, shadow, collar or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Ritual Mark On Wrist
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one deliberate ritual mark, rune or symbol clearly placed on a visible wrist or lower forearm. It should be intentional and distinct from dirt, shadow or sleeve detail.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Show one bare wrist or forearm near the chest, face or weapon hand so the mark is visible. Do not hide it with gloves, sleeves, bracers, cloak, weapon grip, cropping or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: Broken Nose
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a visibly broken nose that healed crooked, uneven, flattened or asymmetrical. The nose must not look perfectly straight or idealised.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Use a clear front or three-quarter face angle so the nose shape is easy to see. The nose must be unobstructed and well lit.

notableFeatures.name: Crooked Nose
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a visibly crooked, bent or asymmetrical nose. It should look naturally uneven and recognisable from the portrait, not perfectly straight.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Use a clear front or three-quarter face angle so the crooked nose shape is visible. Do not hide the nose with shadow, mask, hand, hood or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Split Lip Scar
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a small healed split-lip scar on the upper or lower lip. The lip should have a visible old scar line or notch, not fresh blood.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The mouth and lips must be visible, close and unobstructed. Do not cover them with a mask, beard, hand, scarf, weapon, shadow or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Missing Fingertip
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one fingertip missing from one visible bare hand. The missing fingertip should be clearly visible, healed and non-graphic.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: One bare hand must be shown near the chest, face, shoulder or weapon grip with fingers clearly visible. Do not use gloves. Do not crop out the fingers.

notableFeatures.name: Missing Finger
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one full finger missing from one visible bare hand. The hand should clearly have fewer fingers than normal, healed and non-graphic.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: One bare hand must be shown near the chest, face, shoulder or weapon grip with all remaining fingers visible. Do not use gloves. Do not hide the hand behind a cloak, weapon, sleeve, cropping or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: Missing Ear Tip
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show the tip of one ear missing or shortened as an old healed injury. It must look like damage to the selected species' ear shape, not a different species trait.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: At least one ear must be visible and close enough to see the missing tip. Do not cover the ears with hair, helmet, hood, shadow, pose or cropping.

notableFeatures.name: Notched Ear
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one ear with a clear notch cut into the outer edge. It should look like an old healed notch in the ear, not jewellery or species anatomy.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: At least one ear must be visible and close enough to see the notch. Do not hide the ears with hair, helmet, hood, shadow, pose or cropping.

notableFeatures.name: Eyebrow Piercing
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a small visible metal eyebrow piercing on one eyebrow. It should be clearly metallic jewellery, not a scar, eyebrow gap or skin mark.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The eyebrow area must be close, clear and not hidden by hair, hood, helmet, shadow or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Nose Piercing
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a small visible metal nose piercing, such as a nostril stud, nose ring or small hoop. It should be clearly jewellery on the nose, not a scar or shine.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The nose must be close, clear and unobstructed so the piercing is visible. Do not hide it with mask, hand, shadow, hood or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Lip Piercing
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a small visible metal lip piercing on the upper or lower lip. It should be clearly jewellery, not a scar, tooth or shine.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The mouth and lips must be close, clear and unobstructed. Do not cover them with mask, beard, hand, scarf, weapon, shadow or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Several Ear Piercings
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show several visible metal piercings along one or both ears. There should be multiple small rings, studs or hoops clearly attached to the ear.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: At least one ear must be visible and close enough to see multiple piercings. Do not hide the ears with hair, helmet, hood, shadow or cropping.

notableFeatures.name: Silver Streak Through The Hair
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one distinct silver streak running through the character's hair. It should be a visible section of silver hair contrasting with the selected hair colour, not grey lighting.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The hair must be visible and not hidden by helmet, hood, heavy shadow or cropping. The silver streak should be near the face or crown where it is easy to see.

notableFeatures.name: White Streak Through The Hair
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one distinct white streak running through the character's hair. It should be a visible section of white hair contrasting with the selected hair colour, not a lighting effect.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The hair must be visible and not hidden by helmet, hood, heavy shadow or cropping. The white streak should be near the face or crown where it is easy to see.

notableFeatures.name: Glowing Eyes
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show both eyes with a controlled supernatural glow. The glow must clearly come from the eyes while preserving the selected eye colour as much as possible.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Both eyes must be visible, open, sharp and unobstructed. The whole face should not glow; only the eyes should have the supernatural effect.

notableFeatures.name: Unusually Bright Eyes
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show unusually bright, vivid eyes that stand out clearly while still looking like eyes. They should be more intense than normal but not turn the whole face or background into a glow.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Both eyes must be visible, open, sharp and close enough to see their colour clearly.

notableFeatures.name: Sharp Fangs
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show visible sharp fangs, lower fangs or tusk-like teeth appropriate to the selected species. The fangs must be visible in the mouth without turning the character into an unrelated monster.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The mouth must be slightly open, speaking, grimacing or posed so the fangs are visible. Do not keep the mouth fully closed.
negativePrompt: animal muzzle unless species requires it

notableFeatures.name: Broken Horn
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one horn visibly broken with a blunt damaged end. The horn damage must be obvious, with the other horn or surrounding horn structure making the break clear.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The horns must be visible, close and not hidden by hair, helmet, hood, cropping, angle or shadow. If needed, show both horns so one broken horn is clearly different.

notableFeatures.name: Chipped Horn
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one horn with a visible chip, nick or damaged notch. The horn should remain mostly intact, but the chipped area must be clear.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The horns must be visible, close and well lit. Do not hide the chipped horn with hair, helmet, hood, cropping, angle or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: One Shortened Horn
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one horn visibly shorter than the other. The asymmetry in horn length must be clear and immediately noticeable.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Show both horns clearly so the difference in length is obvious. Do not hide either horn with hair, helmet, hood, cropping or angle.

notableFeatures.name: Cracked Horn
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show a visible crack running through one horn. The horn should remain attached and recognisable, with the crack clearly visible on its surface.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The cracked horn must be visible, close and well lit. Do not hide it with hair, helmet, hood, cropping, angle or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: Gold Tooth
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show one visible gold tooth among otherwise normal visible teeth. The gold tooth should catch the light and be clearly distinct from the other teeth.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: The mouth must be slightly open, smiling, speaking or grimacing enough to reveal the teeth. The gold tooth must not be hidden by lips, beard, mask, shadow or pose.

notableFeatures.name: Ink-Stained Fingers
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show dark ink stains clearly on the fingertips and fingers of one visible bare hand. The stains should look like ink on skin or scales, not black claws, gloves or dirt.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: One bare hand must be shown near the chest, face, shoulder, book, scroll or weapon grip with fingers visible. Do not hide the fingers with gloves, sleeves, weapon, cropping or shadow.

notableFeatures.name: Calloused Hands
notableFeatures.promptInstruction: Show rough, calloused bare hands with worn skin from labour, weapons, crafting or travel. The hands should look visibly tough and weathered, not smooth or delicate.
notableFeatures.visibilityInstruction: Show one or both bare hands clearly near the chest, face, shoulder or weapon grip. The palms, knuckles or fingers must be visible enough to show callouses.
